name: diagram-weaver
description: Generate hand-drawn, minimalist Mermaid diagrams using native VS Code Language Models.

diagramWeaver.groqApiKey.markdownDescription: Your **FREE** Groq API key from [console.groq.com/keys](https://console.groq.com/keys). Groq is the fastest AI API — 1–3 second diagram generation. No credit card needed. Key starts with `gsk_`.

diagramWeaver.geminiApiKey.markdownDescription: Your **FREE** Gemini API key from [aistudio.google.com](https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey). Once set, Diagram Weaver uses Gemini automatically — no GitHub Copilot needed.

chatParticipants.name: diagram
chatParticipants.description: Generate clean, hand-drawn Mermaid diagrams. Works with free Gemini API or GitHub Copilot.

commands.name: fromSelection
commands.description: Generate a diagram based on the currently selected code.

commands.name: explainProject
commands.description: Scan workspace files and generate a high-level architecture diagram.

commands.name: generateDocs
commands.description: Create an ARCHITECTURE.md file with a diagram of the current project.

commands.title: Diagram Weaver: Weave Diagram (Project Auto-Scan or Custom Prompt)
Diagram Weaver: Reset AI Provider (Switch between Groq / Gemini / Copilot)

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
